creator: neldredge@math.ucsd.edu
text:
On Sat, 8 Nov 2008, Stephen Montgomery-Smith wrote:

> I bet that this is an open-axiom issue instead of a FreeBSD issue. Could the 
> originator of the PR get on an open-axiom mailing list and inquire about it 
> there?  If it is broken on other systems as well, then it is not a FreeBSD 
> specific issue.  My personal experience is that the people on the open-axiom 
> mailing lists are helpful to these kinds of queries.

Okay, I built open-axiom on a Linux system and see essentially the same 
behavior.  So it's an upstream issue, I'll take it up with them.  Sorry 
for the noise.

-- 

Nate Eldredge
neldredge@math.ucsd.edu
